plan_under_test: Suspicious rendered-crop evidence is severity-ranked and includes compact review candidates.
tests_added_or_changed: Extend the suspicious-dimension regression test to require the taller mark-scheme crop before the shorter question crop in failure examples and review candidates.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, failure examples are record-ordered and suspicious_rendered_crop_review_candidates is absent.
what_passing_proves: The audit surfaces the highest-severity suspicious dimension evidence first.
Review candidates are compact, deterministic, and derived from the same failure findings.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not visually inspect or repair the candidates.
It does not create a standalone HTML gallery.
risk_of_bad_tests: Low. The fixture has two candidates with unambiguous height ordering.
